content.query:
SELECT distinct
cst.FirstName as [FIRST_NAME]
,cst.LastName as [LAST_NAME]
,cst.Email as [EMAIL_ADDRESS]
,cst.Phone as [PHONE_NUMBER]
,'English' as [LANGUAGE]
,'US' as [COUNTRY]
,'RTW' as [BRAND_NAME]
,'' AS CHANNEL
,job.contractid AS CONTRACT_ID
,job.cst_id AS ACCOUNT_ID
,job.ins_installer1 AS SERVICE_TECHNICIAN_1_ID
,job.ins_installer2 AS SERVICE_TECHNICIAN_2_ID
,job.ins_installer3 AS SERVICE_TECHNICIAN_3_ID
,job.ins_installer4 AS SERVICE_TECHNICIAN_4_ID
,brp.LongName as PRODUCTION_BRANCH_NAME
,mld.ActDate as SERVICE_DATETIME
,prg.Descr as PRODUCT_LINE
,ISNULL((select rpm.descr from [ODS].[LP_RTW_rpm_ReportingMarket] rpm where id=brn.rpm_id),'Undefined') as REPORTING_MARKET  --Add Reporting Market and Type request
,ISNULL((select tof.descr from [ODS].[LP_RTW_tof_TypeOfMarket] tof where id=brn.tof_id),'Undefined') as REPORTING_MARKET_TYPE  --Add Reporting Market and Type request
FROM 
[ODS].[LP_RTW_job_Jobs] job
,[ODS].[LP_RTW_cst_Customers] cst
,[ODS].[LP_RTW_prd_Products] prd
,[ODS].[LP_RTW_prg_Product_Groups] prg
,[ODS].[LP_RTW_brp_ProductionBranches] brp
,[ODS].[LP_RTW_mld_MilestoneDetail] mld
,[ODS].[LP_RTW_mdt_MilestoneDateTypes] mdt
,[ODS].[LP_RTW_brn_Branches] brn  --Add Reporting Market and Type request
,[ODS].[LP_RTW_Lds_Leads] leads --To ignore Kohler records
WHERE 
mld.mdt_id = mdt.id
and job.cst_id = cst.id
and job.ProductID = prd.ProductID
and prd.prg_id = prg.id
and job.id = mld.job_id
and job.brp_id = brp.id
and brp.id=brn.id  --Add Reporting Market and Type request
and mdt.Descr = 'Completion'
and mld.ActDate is NOT NULL
AND datediff(DAY, mld.ActDate, dbo.fnConvertUTCtoPST (getdate())) between 0 and 30
and leads.id = job.lds_id
and leads.src_id not like 'kohler%'
